proposal1.heroHeadline: Studiocraft is losing over $75,000 a year on manual proposal processes. Here's why.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Current proposals take hours of manual work. With our system, it's done in 47 seconds, tailored perfectly to your services.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Below is a breakdown of ongoing losses caused by current inefficiencies.

problems.title: Time Drain
problems.description: Each proposal takes an average of 3 hours to prepare. That's 3 hours not spent on designing or consulting—your core services.

problems.title: High Labor Costs
problems.description: Every hour spent on proposals costs Studiocraft $150 in wages. Multiply this by your annual volume and watch the dollars vanish.

problems.title: Missed Opportunities
problems.description: Delayed proposals mean missed engagements. Every day a proposal sits unfinished is a potential deal lost to competitors.

problems.title: Brand Inconsistency
problems.description: Inconsistently branded proposals confuse clients. Misalignment with your premium image can cost you contracts and credibility.

problems.title: Error Prone
problems.description: Manual entries lead to mistakes. Each error could cost you a client, tarnishing your reputation and leading to lost revenue.

problems.title: Lack of Insights
problems.description: Without tracking, you don't know which proposals succeed. This means repeated mistakes and lost chances to refine your strategy.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system replaces all these inefficiencies with swift automation and precision.

solutions.title: Instant Analysis
solutions.description: Currently, you manually gather client data. Our system scrapes and analyzes websites in seconds, ensuring accuracy and speed.

solutions.title: Auto-Branding
solutions.description: Now, branding is inconsistent. Our system generates proposals with consistent, professional branding, reflecting Studiocraft's image every time.

solutions.title: Error-Free Proposals
solutions.description: Manual processes are prone to errors. Our automated system eliminates human error, ensuring flawless proposals every time.

solutions.title: Real-Time Tracking
solutions.description: Currently, there's no way to track proposals. Our system provides real-time tracking, giving insights into client engagement and proposal success.

solutions.title: Rapid Generation
solutions.description: Proposals take hours to craft. With our solution, generate client-ready proposals in under 60 seconds, freeing up time for more strategic tasks.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Studiocraft's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Studiocraft around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Studiocraft.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Unlock Revenue Growth Through Targeted Digital Strategies
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Our team will enhance your digital presence to capture more leads and convert them into loyal customers.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently missing out on significant revenue due to digital underperformance.

problems.title: Low Website Conversion
problems.description: Your website is currently converting only 1% of visitors. This means 99% of potential customers are leaving without purchasing.

problems.title: Poor SEO Rankings
problems.description: Ranking low on search engines means you're invisible to 70% of potential clients searching for your services.

problems.title: Ineffective Ad Spend
problems.description: Current ad campaigns are generating a low ROI, resulting in wasted budget and missed opportunities.

problems.title: Weak Brand Visibility
problems.description: Lack of consistent brand messaging is causing a disconnect with customers, leading to an estimated 20% loss in potential engagement.

problems.title: Outdated Social Media Strategy
problems.description: An outdated strategy is leading to low engagement rates, missing out on a growing audience segment.

problems.title: Inefficient Customer Journey
problems.description: A complex customer journey is causing a drop-off in potential sales, with an estimated 30% loss in completed transactions.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our tailored solutions will directly address these challenges, ensuring you capture lost revenue.

solutions.title: Web Optimization
solutions.description: Enhances user experience and increases conversion rates by simplifying navigation and improving page load times.

solutions.title: SEO Enhancement
solutions.description: Boosts your search engine visibility, making it easier for potential customers to find you.

solutions.title: Paid Advertising Management
solutions.description: Optimizes ad spend to improve ROI and capture high-intent customers.

solutions.title: Social Media Revamp
solutions.description: Rejuvenates your social media presence to increase engagement and connect with your audience.
